messages.subject: European Cities - Sustainability Leaders
messages.body: BUILD2: European cities dominating sustainability metrics. Copenhagen: 62% bike commutes, carbon neutral by 2025 target, wind energy pioneer. Zurich: Clean air (AQI<20), 40% renewable energy, public transit 70% modal share. Amsterdam: 67% bike usage, circular economy initiatives, green tech startups booming. Stockholm: 100% renewable electricity goal by 2025, eco-districts model. Should sustainability weight more in final ranking? These cities punch above weight in green metrics.
